category_sources: source_facts.description says xmp is a command-line player for module music formats; official homepage describes Extended Module Player as a portable command-line module player.
display_name_sources: official homepage title is Extended Module Player and describes the project as xmp.
docs_sources: official homepage is the best documentation surface for the player and includes usage, supported formats, releases, and repository links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/libxmp/xmp-cli, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists MOD, S3M, IT module formats; official homepage lists MOD, S3M, XM, and IT support and identifies xmp as command-line software.
